
---

### `about.qmd`
```markdown
---
title: "About"
---

# About Me

I’m a senior Data Analytics student at **Denison University**. I enjoy turning messy data into clear insights and communicating results in a reproducible way with a focus on image analysis and they ways in which it can help discern issues in biology.

## Skills
- **Programming:** R (tidyverse, dplyr), Python (numPy, OpenCV, SpaCy, pandas), SQL  
- **Tools:** Git/GitHub, Quarto, Excel, Tableau/Power BI, ASANA 
- **Analytics:** visualization, modeling, experimental design, reporting

## What I’m working on
- (Add 1–2 bullets: capstone topic, research, internship project, etc.)

## Coursework (optional)
- (Add 3–5 relevant courses)

## Resume (optional)
Add a link to a PDF resume stored in your repo, or link to LinkedIn.
